zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Trecarell於1470年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾萊展特時，她的父親Sir John I Trecarrell25歲，母親Lady Dorothy Vincent19歲。她和John Tucker Jr.至少有5個兒子。她於11年住在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可。她去世於1517年在英國英格蘭戴文斯托可藍德享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文斯托可藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Trecarell于1470年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾萊展特时，她的父亲Sir John I Trecarrell25岁，母亲Lady Dorothy Vincent19岁。她和John Tucker Jr.至少有5个儿子。她于11年住在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可。她去世于1517年在英国英格兰戴文斯托可藍德享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文斯托可藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Trecarell was born in 1470, in Lezant, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John I Trecarrell, was 25 and her mother, Lady Dorothy Vincent, was 19. She had at least 5 sons with John Tucker Jr.. She lived in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 11. She died in 1517, in Stockland, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Stockland, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Trecarell est née en 1470, à Lezant, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John I Trecarrell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Dorothy Vincent, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils avec John Tucker Jr.. Elle a vécu à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 11. Elle est décédée en 1517, à Stockland, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Stockland, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Trecarell 1470 in Lezant, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John I Trecarrell 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Dorothy Vincent 19. Sie hatte mit John Tucker Jr. mindestens 5 Söhne. 11 hat sie in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb 1517 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Stockland, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stockland, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Trecarell è nata il nel 1470 nel Lezant, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John I Trecarrell, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Lady Dorothy Vincent, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli con John Tucker Jr.. Vissuto a Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 11. Morì nel 1517, nel Stockland, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Stockland, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Trecarellが1470年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルレザントで生まれた時，父Sir John I Trecarrellは25歳，母Lady Dorothy Vincentは19歳であった。彼女はJohn Tucker Jr.との間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼女は11年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンに住んでいた。彼女は1517年にイギリスイギリスデボンストックランドで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンストックランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Trecarell(이)가 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 레자트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John I Trecarrell(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Dorothy Vincent(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 John Tucker Jr.(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 11년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 살았다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스톡랜드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스톡랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Trecarell nasceu em 1470, em Lezant, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John I Trecarrell, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Dorothy Vincent, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos com John Tucker Jr.. Ela viveu em Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 11. Ela faleceu em 1517, em Stockland, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Stockland, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Trecarell родилась в 1470 г. в местности лезант, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John I Trecarrell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Dorothy Vincent, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от John Tucker Jr. Она жила в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 11 году. Она умерла в 1517 г. в местности стоккланд, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности стоккланд, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorothy Trecarell nació en 1470, en Lezant, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John I Trecarrell, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Dorothy Vincent, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con John Tucker Jr.. Vivió en Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 11. Murió en 1517, en Stockland, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Stockland, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
